author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit d4bac84f. Added PackedNestedTensor with flat packed storage + offsets array — the efficient layout for bulk elementwise ops on variable-length sequences. Public API: from_sequences/from_nested/from_padded/to_nested/to_padded, map elementwise, add/sub/mul/div binary ops with layout validation, sum_per_component / mean_per_component reductions. Layout invariants documented on the struct. 22 new tests cover construction, error paths, elementwise ops, per-component reductions, padded round-trip, and NestedTensor interop. Coexists with the existing list-of-tensors NestedTensor (each is better for a different workload). 958 ferrotorch-core tests pass.
